Courts

Nets for practice, a full box for match night.

Choose a focused training lane or bring your squad for a fast 6v6 session.

Net 1 - Powerplay

Fast indoor lane with bowling machine space and video review angle.

€ 35 / hour

Net 2 - Yorker

Compact training lane for private coaching and small-group practice.

€ 30 / hour

Court 3 - Match Box

Full box cricket court for 6v6 games, leagues, and corporate events.

€ 55 / hour
